flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kishwaukee College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Kishwaukee College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (60.0% → 74.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Kishwaukee College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.9k).
